explanation: The user wants to retrieve a tomato from the microwave. The state shows that tomato_1 is currently on top of microwave_0, which is already toggled on. Since the robot is not currently holding any object, the plan begins with moving to the microwave. Once at the microwave, the robot will pick up the tomato (tomato_1) to complete the task. The object name is chosen as tomato_1 because it is the distinct tomato mentioned in the state and not already in use (tomato_0 is on the countertop).
